task: The jeweller polished the diamond ring. It sparkled brilliantly under the showcase lights afterward.
implementations: The pronoun "It" refers to "the diamond ring".

task: Frank invited Joseph to his wedding. He gladly accepted the invitation immediately.
The architect designed the bridge across the river. It opened to traffic last spring.
Helen recommended a recipe to Margaret. She had inherited it from her grandmother.
The fisherman caught the trout in the stream. It was the largest of the day.
Andrew confided in Christopher about his concerns. He had always been a trustworthy friend.
The barista served the latte to the customer. It had been prepared with extra foam.
Catherine asked Victoria for guidance. She had years of experience in the same field.
The guide led the tourist through the cave. He had explored every passage many times before.
